meta.project: Real Estate CRM - Flask Web Application

product_overview: A comprehensive and modular Real Estate CRM web application built with Flask, designed to efficiently manage properties, agents, customers, deals, and tasks. It leverages AI-powered property recommendations and advanced analytics to enhance user decision-making and streamline real estate workflows.
core_goals: Provide a full lifecycle management system for real estate properties including CRUD operations and advanced filtering.
Enable management and tracking of real estate agents, customers, deals, and associated tasks.
Integrate AI technologies for property recommendations and data extraction to improve matching accuracy and operational insights.
Offer a responsive, secure, and user-friendly interface with modern web technologies and security best practices.
Ensure robust backend architecture using Flask and SQLAlchemy with PostgreSQL support for scalability and maintainability.
Provide comprehensive validation, security protections, and continuous integration testing to maintain high quality.
Support efficient deployment and configuration management with dynamic environment variable control and admin interface.
key_features: Complete Property Management System with detailed attributes and Iranian real estate market support.
Agent Management with profiles, performance tracking, and commission automation.
Customer Relationship Management with preferences, budget tracking, and lead status management.
Deal Pipeline Management with deal stages, commission calculations, and multiple transaction types.
Task Management System covering assignment, prioritization, and status tracking for agent activities.
AI-Powered Property Recommendations leveraging Google Gemini API with fallback and reasoning explanations.
Advanced Search and Filtering capabilities for multi-criteria property queries.
Hybrid Property Viewing System combining modal and dedicated page views for enhanced user experience.
Dashboard and Analytics providing real-time market insights and activity summaries.
Modal-Based CRUD Interface for seamless data operations across all entities.
Property Sharing and Social Media Integration for easy property promotion.
Report Generation with export options to PDF, Excel, and JSON formats.
Dynamic Environment Configuration Management with admin UI and security.
In-app Notification System for alerts and messages.
Background Job Scheduling for automated tasks and data processing.
Robust Security Measures including CSRF protection, XSS prevention, and secure session management.
Responsive UI designed with Bootstrap 5 for mobile and desktop usability.
user_flow_summary: User logs in and accesses the dashboard displaying overall system statistics and recent activities.
User navigates to property listing to search, filter, and manage properties using hybrid modal and dedicated detail pages.
User manages agents, customers, deals, and tasks through dedicated interfaces with CRUD operations accessible via modals.
For customers, users view AI-powered property recommendations tailored by preference analysis or general suggestions.
Admin users manage environment configuration variables securely through a dedicated interface with audit trails.
Users receive in-app notifications and alerts triggered by system events or updates.
Users export reports on properties, deals, and recommendations via the web interface.
Background scheduled jobs run to refresh AI matching data and system tasks automatically.
validation_criteria: All entity CRUD operations function correctly with proper validation and data integrity.
AI property recommendations return relevant and explainable matches, with graceful fallback.
Page load times meet the target of under 2 seconds for standard operations.
System reliability achieves 99.9% uptime measured by monitoring and error handling effectiveness.
Security validations enforce CSRF tokens, secure sessions, and XSS protections.
Code coverage exceeds 90% with automated testing executed in CI pipelines.
Database transactions handle rollback correctly in error scenarios without data corruption.
Responsive design verified across modern desktop and mobile browsers.
Environment variable management logs and secures sensitive information appropriately.
Notification and background job systems execute and display messages reliably.

features.name: Property Management System
features.description: Complete CRUD operations for real estate properties with advanced filtering, search, and hybrid viewing (modal + dedicated page)

features.name: Customer Relationship Management
features.description: Customer database with preferences, budget tracking, and deal history

features.name: Agent Management
features.description: Real estate agent profiles, specializations, and performance tracking

features.name: Deal Pipeline Management
features.description: Sales pipeline tracking with deal stages, offers, and status management

features.name: Task Management System
features.description: Task assignment, tracking, and completion for agents with priorities and due dates

features.name: AI-Powered Property Recommendations
features.description: Machine learning recommendations using Gemini API for customer-property matching

features.name: Dashboard and Analytics
features.description: Real-time dashboard with statistics, recent activities, and market analysis

features.name: Hybrid Property Viewing System
features.description: Dual viewing approach with quick modal views and dedicated detail pages for enhanced UX

features.name: Advanced Search and Filtering
features.description: Multi-criteria property search with price ranges, location, property type, and agent filters

features.name: Error Handling and Logging
features.description: Comprehensive error handling with JSON/HTML response support and database rollback

features.name: Modal-Based CRUD Interface
features.description: Dynamic modal loading for create, read, update, delete operations across all entities

features.name: Property Sharing and Social Integration
features.description: Property URL sharing, social media integration, and clipboard functionality

features.name: Report Generation and Export
features.description: PDF, Excel, and JSON export capabilities for properties, deals, and recommendations

features.name: Environment Configuration Management
features.description: Dynamic environment variable management with admin interface

features.name: Notification System
features.description: In-app notification system for user alerts and status messages

features.name: Background Job Scheduling
features.description: Automated background tasks and data matching with APScheduler

features.name: Database Transaction Management
features.description: Safe database operations with rollback support and connection pooling

features.name: Form Validation and CSRF Protection
features.description: WTForms-based validation with CSRF protection and error handling

features.name: Responsive UI with Bootstrap
